scripts.db:compact: node -e "const Database = require('better-sqlite3'); ['Logs/medusa.db', ...require('fs').readdirSync('Ai Database', {recursive:true}).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.db')).map(f=>'Ai Database/'+f)].forEach(p=>{try{const d=new Database(p);d.prepare('VACUUM').run();d.close();console.log('VACUUM',p)}catch(e){console.log('SKIP',p,e.message)}})"
